work_unit: PA-AND-01 derived fix: android/api.js api() helper — destructure opts.headers so ...opts spread no longer overwrites the merged headers object (audit-2026-07-06-002)
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress, audit-2026-07-06-002 personal-assistant deep audit; 5 of 12 findings already dispatched+merged (PA-ASR-01/02/03, PA-WIKI-01, PA-REC-01). PA-AND-01 (medium, P2) is highest-severity pending finding. Bug: `fetch(url, { headers: {...opts.headers}, ...opts })` — JS spread last-key-wins means `...opts` re-introduces `opts.headers` (the un-merged original) and silently drops the default `Content-Type: application/json`. Future caller `api('/x',{method:'POST',body,headers:{Authorization:'Bearer t'}})` loses Content-Type → backend 415/parse fail. InboxPage.jsx:59 happens to pass Content-Type explicitly so today 'accidentally works'.
action: Destructure `headers` (and rest) out of opts before building fetch options: `const { headers: customHeaders, ...rest } = opts; fetch(url, { ...rest, headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', ...customHeaders} })`. Now `rest` has no `headers` key → spread can't clobber merged headers; caller's customHeaders still win over default. Single-file route-fix, no public-interface touched.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit → 复用同 area worktree opt-pa-android-api-1783275991, 方向=pa-android-api (route-fix, no new wt)
worktree branch auto/opt-pa-android-api-1783275991 pushed (status -sb clean, ahead=0)

post-fix content verified: `const { headers: customHeaders, ...rest } = opts; fetch(url, { ...rest, headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', ...customHeaders} })` — rest lacks headers key, so default Content-Type survives even when caller passes Authorization

behavioral proof: api('/x',{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer t'}}) now yields headers={Content-Type:application/json, Authorization:Bearer t} (previously headers={Authorization:Bearer t} only, Content-Type dropped)
next_suggestion: 继续派生 PA-AND-02（android/api.js API_BASE 硬编码 port 3015，low P3）或 PA-WIKI-02（wiki.py _find_existing 子串匹配过松，low P3）。注意：本次踩到 opt-worktree 路径校验版本漂移——当前版 cmd_commit 拒绝绝对路径（M-002），需用相对项目根路径（android/api.js），与 memory note opt-worktree-absolute-file-path 相反，下轮应更新该 memory。

audit_findings.finding: PA-AND-01: api() helper builds fetch options as `{ headers: {...opts.headers}, ...opts }` — JS spread last-key-wins means `...opts` re-introduces the original `opts.headers` and silently overwrites the just-merged headers object, dropping the default `Content-Type: application/json`. Any future caller passing both a body and a custom header (e.g. Authorization) loses Content-Type → 415/parse failure. InboxPage.jsx:59 only accidentally works because it explicitly sets Content-Type:text/plain.
audit_findings.remediation: Destructure headers out: `const { headers: customHeaders, ...rest } = opts; fetch(url, { ...rest, headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', ...customHeaders} })`.
